LanguageData.VGE_Comet_Thought.stages.0.label: beautiful comet
LanguageData.VGE_CrewEuphoria.stages.0.description: Our latest gravship launch was just perfect. I will remember it for a long time.
LanguageData.VGE_CrewEuphoria.stages.0.label: crew euphoria
LanguageData.VGE_ToxicHaze.stages.0.description: This toxic dust is unnerving and physically irritating. I want to get inside.
LanguageData.VGE_ToxicHaze.stages.0.label: toxic haze
